Whether you're a data hoarder or not, nothing beats the convenience of having some extra storage for your devices. The problem is that what might seem like an incredible deal, ends up being far from it. So instead of worrying about buying some external storage from a company you've never heard of, stick with Samsung. 

The company makes some of my favorite portable SSDs, and all three of the latest iterations are on sale for Cyber Monday. Hands-down, the best deal comes from Best Buy, as you can get the Samsung T7 with 2TB of storage for $80 off! If you compare that to the T7 Shield Cyber Monday Samsung deal, then $20 extra dollars will get you double the storage. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Tab A7 Lite: $159.99 $99.99 at Best Buy

Although it certainly lacks a lot of the bells and whistles found on other modern tablets, the Galaxy Tab A7 Lite is nevertheless a simple and reliable slab that boasts a durably metal frame, around 10 hours of battery life, and a decent MediaTek processor that should handle most casual tasks with ease. It's even better during Best Buy's early Cyber Monday sale, as a $60 discount is dropping the price down to just a Benjamin. 

To make the purchase an even more-appealing prospect, Best Buy is also throwing in six months of Webroot security software, a month of Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, and three months of YouTube Premium for 100% free.

  • Samsung Galaxy S23 128GB: $799.99 $699.99 at Best Buy

The latest flagship phone from Samsung, the Galaxy S23 boasts the excellent Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor with a vibrant 120Hz display, great battery life, and all the comprehensive software support you could ever want in a device. It's not a dramatic upgrade over the S22, but in this case, that's a good thing. If it's not broke, why fix it? 

Grab an unlocked Galaxy S23 from Best Buy during their leftover Black Friday/early Cyber Monday sale and you'll get $100 off straightaway alongside four months of SiriusXM music streaming. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Buds FE: $99.99 $69.99 at Amazon

If you're hoping to buy a new pair of wireless earbuds this holiday season, the Galaxy Buds FE are an awesome choice. These sleek buds just came out last month so they're packed with all of the latest Samsung audio technology, including active noise cancellation (unusual in this price range), three mics per bud, and up to 30 hours of battery life on a single charge. Grab a pair of these Fan Edition earbuds before the Cyber Monday festivities wrap up and you'll instantly save 30% on your purchase. These specs for $70? That's a deal worth celebrating. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 512GB: $1,919.99 $1,799.99, plus up to $1,000 off with trade-in

If you're ready to finally invest in the ultra-powerful and innovative (not to mention expensive) Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5, now would be a good time to do it. Just in time for Cyber Monday, Samsung is offering a free storage boost to 512GB (a $120 value) plus up to $1,000 of trade-in credit when you send in an old or broken device. You can use the website's trade-in tool to see exactly how much you can save, but it looks like both the Galaxy Z Fold 3 and Z Fold 4 will get you the max credit!

If you don't have anything to trade in, it's worth noting that Amazon is also slashing an excellent $500 off the price of the unlocked 512GB model, no strings attached. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 256GB: $1,799 $999 at Best Buy

New day, new deal, and this one's the best yet! Get $800 off a Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 when you order from Best Buy and activate it today. That's by far the lowest price we've seen — the previous record being $1,299 at Amazon up until now.

If you've got a Best Buy anywhere near you, you can walk out of the store in the next few minutes with the best foldable phone Samsung has ever made. Plus, getting it at nearly half price will make anyone feel good in a year when prices for everything never seem to stop climbing.

You don't have to trade in anything to get this deal, either, but trading in always makes the price even lower. Who doesn't like that?

  • Samsung Slim S Pen case for Z Fold 5: $99.99 $51.25 at Amazon

There's nothing like a half price deal on Cyber Monday, so be sure to pick up this Slim S Pen case for your Galaxy Z Fold 5 and revel in the half-size design Samsung came up with.

This clever case protects your Galaxy Z Fold 5 all while adding a handy S Pen to the back. Just click down the latch and release the pen when you're ready to write and pop the pen back into the case when you're done. It couldn't be easier, and we're pretty sure this case can't get any cheaper.

  • Samsung 65" S95C Series Quantum HDR Smart TV: $3,297.99 $2,397.99 at Amazon

Smart TVs are often big purchases, and if you want the best that Samsung has to offer, then you'll typically have to pay thousands to get the entertainment powerhouse of your dreams. Fortunately, Cyber Monday is making things a little easier by slashing an incredible 27% off the feature-packed 65" S95C Series Quantum HDR Smart TV. 

That's a discount of $900, plus you're getting an absolute beast of a TV, coming complete with Samsung's AI-powered Neural Quantum processor with 4K upscaling, immersive object tracking sound, and a game optimizer that delivers refresh rates of up to 144Hz. When you're spending thousands on a TV, every penny counts. 

  • Samsung Galaxy S22 128GB: $699.99 FREE with new line at Verizon

The Samsung Galaxy S22 may be a 2022 phone, but it still holds its own against the best devices around, pairing the efficiency of the still-great Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 chip with some solid camera tech and loads of software support. Verizon customers who add a new line with any 5G Unlimited plan and you'll get enough promo credits to make this flagship phone 100% free, no trade-in required. You'll have to choose between the Phantom Black and Bora Purple versions of the phone, however, as it appears that the other colors are out of stock at the moment. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Buds 2: $149.99 $89.99 at Amazon

Although they aren't the best wireless earbuds on the market today, Samsung's Galaxy Buds 2 earbuds deliver an impressively punchy and bass-heavy sound profile, active noise cancellation, and a comfortable fit. Still, I wouldn't necessarily recommend them unless they were paired with a great discount, which is fortunately the case during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale. Pick up a pair in Olive and you'll save a sweet 40% on your purchase. It's as simple as that!

  • Samsung The Freestyle 2nd Gen Smart Projector (2023): $797.99 $597.99 at Amazon 

Smart projectors aren't exactly our bread and butter, but Samsung's The Freestyle deserves a particular mention, especially when you pair it with a 25% discount during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale. This device lets you project content from your favorite streaming services on any surface in vibrant 1920x1080 resolution, plus you get access to a console-free Gaming Hub and immersive 360-degree sound. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 4 128GB: $999.99 $299 with Verizon activation at Best Buy

We once called it the "perfect foldable", and now you can save a whopping $700 on the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 4 when you activate it through Verizon on the Best Buy website. That's obviously an incredible discount, and Galaxy fans are flocking in droves to take advantage of it, so check Best Buy's stock before you get too excited! If you don't want to activate right away, it appears the Best Buy is also selling the unlocked phone with a still-great $535 discount, but it's currently out of stock.  

It may not be the latest foldable phone from Samsung, but the Z Flip 4 nevertheless boasts the great Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Plus Gen 1 processor, a pair of vibrant 120Hz displays, and a unique, exceedingly pocketable design. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic: $379 $149 at Walmart

Someone at Walmart corporate must have bought an overstock of Galaxy Watch 4 Classic watches at some point, because they've been selling the 46mm at a discount for months — though at $149, it's about as low as we've ever seen it, and it's just as stylish as ever.

Even though the watch is "old" compared to the Watch 6 Classic — currently $349 — it's still due to receive Wear OS support through mid-2025. So you're essentially getting a stylish timepiece for less than half the price of a new Classic model, and the promise that it'll get Wear OS 5 and 6 down the line. It's about as close as you'll get to a budget Android watch that's still worth using!

  • 32" UR59 ViewFinity 4K UHD (3840x2160) monitor: $450 $290.87 at Amazon
  • 32" UJ59 ViewFinity 4K UHD (3840x2160) monitor: $340 $269.99 at Amazon

We've highlighted a couple of Samsung's gaming monitors, but we don't want to neglect people who want a reliable 4K monitor for productivity. In this case, getting a 32-inch 4K display for under $300 is a pretty fantastic steal. Our colleagues at Windows Central rated the UJ59 as their best budget 4K monitor, praising the color accuracy, thin bezel, and support for FreeSync and G-Sync. The only question is whether you want to spend a few extra bucks for the curved version. 

  • Samsung A23 5G: $300 $264.58 at Amazon

As much as we love Samsung's premium foldables and S23s, they're still expensive even at Cyber Monday prices. If you want to start with something affordable, look into the Galaxy A23 5G, currently 12% off for Cyber Monday. 

Our #2 pick for the best Android phones under $300, the A23 5G gives you a 120Hz display, 5,000mAh battery, a future Android 14 OS update, and the promise of four years of security updates through 2026. Its Snapdragon 695 chip will do its job better than some other budget options, too. 

Still, if you can afford it, the Galaxy A54 ($324, or $125 off) is a much more reliable and powerful phone for $60 more. 

  • Sony WH-1000XM4 headphones: $348 $228 at Amazon

The Sony WH-1000XM4 may not be the best wireless headphones on the market now that the XM5s have come along, but they're still outstanding headphones, with an elegant, ultra-comfortable design, customizable active noise cancellation, and up to 30 hours of battery life on a single charge. Thanks to Cyber Monday, they're also seeing a sweet 34% discount at Amazon, dropping these cans to a lowest-ever price. 

You can also grab these headphones for the same price at Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale.  

  • Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra 128GB: $1,199.99 $499.99 with activation at Best Buy

To be totally honest, I expected Black Friday to have a better showing of deals, with Cyber Monday merely offering the leftovers. Fortunately for all of us, Best Buy is subverting that expectation by slashing $700 off the Galaxy S22 Ultra when you activate the phone through their site. No trade-in required! 

For just $499.99, you're getting one of the best phones released in 2022, coming complete with the powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 processor, 8K video support, and a gorgeous 6.8-inch AMOLED display with a built-in S Pen stylus. If you choose not to activate the phone today, you'll still get a decent $120 off (although if that's the case, I'd go with this $900 S23 Ultra deal). 

  • Echo Show 5 (3rd Gen): $89.99 $39.99 at Amazon

If you're looking to revamp your smart home ecosystem this holiday season, look no further than the Echo Show 5 (3rd Gen). This "best on a budget" smart display boasts a compact and versatile 5.5-inch touchscreen display, some decent-for-the-size speakers, and a crystal-clear 2MP camera for video calls and selfies, I guess. The compact size means this smart display won't interrupt your home's décor, but you'll still be able to manage your calendar, check the weather, and much more using simple Alexa voice commands.

With a starting price of $90, the Echo Show 5 was already cheap, but Amazon's Cyber Monday sale is slashing an epic 56% off the price of the display, sending it crashing down to a mere $39.99.  

  • Insignia 32-inch F20 Smart Fire TV: $149.99 $79.99 at Amazon

If you still have some money left over after all the Black Friday and Cyber Monday shopping, why not spend $80 on a smart TV? Insignia's 32-inch F20 Fire TV is still sitting with a 47% discount during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale, and that's an absolute steal. Sure, it's not the most feature-packed TV on the market, but the F20 boasts a nice-looking HD screen, the Fire TV streaming platform, and a free Alexa Voice Remote. And again, it's 80 bucks. 

  • Google Pixel 7a 128GB: $499 $374 at Best Buy

This 25% discount on the Google Pixel 7a was one of the most publicized deals over the past Black Friday and Cyber Monday weekend, but it deserves just one more mention for anyone who missed it. The Pixel 7a is one of our favorite Android phones of the year, balancing flagship-level software with a reasonable price tag and the best haptics in its class. 

With a starting price of $499, the Pixel 7a was already affordable, but this Cyber Monday discount has sent the price of the unlocked phone crashing down to just $374, which is the cheapest that it's ever been.  Best Buy is even sweetening the deal by throwing three months of YouTube Premium for free. 

  • Garmin Forerunner 955 47mm: $499.99 $399.99 at Best Buy

Our resident wearable expert Michael Hicks once called the Garmin Forerunner 955 the "best runner's watch, period", and now you can grab one for the discounted price of $399.99 during Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale. This durable watch provides all of the health and fitness tracking data you could ever need, plus it comes with dozens of activity modes, accurate GPS support, and up to 15 days of battery life in smartwatch mode. 

  • Amazon Fire 7 (2022) tablet: $59.99 $39.99 at Amazon

A tablet for $40? That price alone could justify the purchase of a Fire 7 Tablet during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale, but it helps that it's honestly a pretty good device when it comes down to it. Far from the most feature-packed or innovative Android tablet on the market, the Amazon Fire 7 nevertheless boasts a lightweight 7-inch display, expandable storage, and enough power to handle most day-to-day tasks without skipping a beat. It's a cheap tablet, but it's a good cheap tablet, and for $40, it's an absolute steal. 

  • OnePlus Nord N30 128GB: $299.99 $149 with activation at Best Buy

The OnePlus Nord N30 is one of the best cheap Android phones to come out this year, with a vibrant 120Hz display, ultra-efficient Snapdragon chip, and some pretty amazing camera tech for the price. It even has a headphone jack! With a starting retail price of $299.99, the Nord N30 was already quite cheap, but Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale just upped the ante by dropping 50% off the price of the phone, as long as you're willing to activate it through their site. If you'd prefer the unlocked version, you'll still save a nice $70 on your purchase, no strings attached.
item.description:
Quick Menu

1. Quick links
2. Editor's picks
3. LIVE deals

If you've been even remotely online the past few weeks, you probably noticed that Cyber Monday deals have taken over the internet. Every retailer, streaming service, and wireless carrier under the sun has been launching holiday promotions in an attempt to earn your business, and if you're anything like me, you're just about ready to tune it all out. 

In an attempt to make life easier for all of us, we've been working to curate the endless lists of deals so the holiday shopping experience (for tech, at least) is a bit more streamlined this year. In other words, if you were planning on buying anything Android-related this weekend, you've come to the right place. From now until the end of Cyber Monday (and probably beyond), we're going to be gathering all of our favorite discounted devices and dropping them below for your perusal. Oh, and we'll be doing this LIVE so you don't miss anything. 

Amazon, Best Buy, Samsung and many more have all launched record-smashing Cyber Monday deals. Keep reading to see all of the best picks on the web, and check back later if you don't find anything now: we'll keep adding new offers as they appear. First up, let's take a look at the Top 5 truly unmissable Black Friday Samsung deals. If you want to go straight to our live feed, simply click this Jump to Live Deals ↓ button. 

Quick links

  • Amazon: Up to 60% off Amazon devices, headphones, and more
  • Best Buy: Historic price drops on phones, TVs, tech
  • Samsung: Up to $1,000 off TVs, Galaxy S23, Z Fold 5, trade-in offers
  • Walmart: Sitewide deals on appliances, games, tech
  • Verizon: Up to $1,000 off Samsung, bundle discounts, free phones
  • AT&T: Free S23 Plus, Z Flip 5, iPhone 15 with eligible trade-in/new line
  • Mint Mobile: $600 off Pixel 7 Pro, plus six months of free wireless
  • Lenovo: Up to 78% off PCs, monitors, and more
  • Dell: Up to 60% off gaming laptops, Chromebooks, and monitors
  • Hulu: Get a YEAR of streaming for $0.99 per month
  • Max: Six months of the With Ads plan for $2.99 per month

Editor's picks

1. Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 5 256GB: $999.99 $799.99 at Best Buy

The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 5 was our favorite foldable phone released this year, boasting a powerful Snapdragon chip, a new-and-improved cover display, and a durable clamshell construction. Grab the unlocked flip phone during Best Buy's Black Friday sale and you'll get $200 off no strings attached. There's also some enhanced trade-in credit up for grabs, plus you'll get a free month of Xbox Game Pass. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $799.99 | Samsung - $999.99 (up to $600 off with trade-inView Deal

2. Google Pixel 7 Pro 128GB: $600 off, plus six months FREE with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile

This is not a Cyber Monday-specific deal, but it deserves a mention nevertheless. Pair the purchase of the excellent Pixel 7 Pro with any six-month wireless plan at Mint Mobile, and the carrier will hook you up with $600 off the phone and an additional six months of wireless service for 100% free. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $649 | Amazon - $649View Deal

3. Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 40mm: $299.99 $228.99 at Amazon

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 topped our list of the best Android smartwatches of 2023, and now you can grab the 40mm version for just $228.99 at Amazon. With the GW6, you're getting top-of-the-line Wear OS software, tons of battery life, and all of the health and fitness tracking features you could ever need in a watch. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $229.99 | Samsung - $229.99View Deal

4.  Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon

The Galaxy S23 FE just hit store shelves in late October, and yet Verizon customers can already grab one for 100% free when they add a line with any 5G Unlimited plan. No trade-in required! The balanced Galaxy S23 FE may not have been the most groundbreaking device to hit store shelves this year, but if you're looking to update your wireless service anyway, this Verizon deal is tough to beat. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $399.99 | Best Buy - $449.99View Deal

5. Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro: $239.99 $159.99, plus $10 gift card at Amazon

Cutting-edge and exceedingly comfortable, we picked the Galaxy Buds 2 Pro as the "best-sounding" wireless earbuds on the market today. Grab a pair from Amazon right now and you'll get a historic 31% discount AND a free $10 gift card, no strings attached. 

Price comparison: Samsung - $159.99 | Best Buy - $159.99 View Deal

6. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 256GB: $1,799 $999 at Best Buy

Get a phone and a tablet folded into one device, now at nearly half cost with this $800 off deal at Best Buy. Just activate it today and walk out of the store with one of the best phones of 2023.

Price comparison: Amazon - $1,299 | up to $1,000 off at AT&T with trade-inView Deal

LIVE deals

  • Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra: $1,199.99 $899.99 at Best Buy

Why not kick things off with the most powerful Android phone on the market? The Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra boasts a built-in stylus, a gorgeous 6.8-inch AMOLED display, and the power of the Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor. Grab one of these beasts of performance at Best Buy and you'll save a record-smashing $300 on your purchase. As the biggest drawback of the S23 Ultra has always been its prohibitive price, this Black Friday discount is a big deal. 

  • Fossil Gen 6 44mm: $299 $169.99 at Amazon

Stylish and versatile, the Fossil Gen 6 boasts an efficient Qualcomm chip, loads of activity-tracking features, and great battery life with super-fast charging. It's a few years old at this point, but that isn't necessarily a bad thing, as you can currently grab this watch for just $170 during Amazon's Black Friday sale. That's not a record low price for the watch, but it's pretty darn close.

  • Acer Chromebook Spin 714: $699.99 $469.99 at Best Buy

We've said it before and we'll say it again: Acer's Chromebook Spin 714 offers the perfect balance of cost and performance, especially when you pair it with a $230 discount during Best Buy's Black Friday sale. You get the 360-degree hinge that lets you turn the laptop into a tablet, plus a 13th Gen Intel Core processor, durable military-grade construction, and up to 10 hours of battery life on a single charge. Best Buy will even throw in a free protective sleeve and three months of YouTube Premium for free. 

  • TCL 65" Class 4 Series 4K UHD Roku TV: $529.99 $228 at Walmart

If you've been hunting for a smart TV this holiday season, you probably noticed that it's nearly impossible to find a 65-inch TV for less than $500, especially one that supports 4K UHD picture. This Black Friday deal from Walmart changes all that. For a mere $228, you're getting outstanding picture with 4K upscaling, HDR support, and of course, instant access to all of your favorite streaming services (plus a lot of free stuff!) thanks to the Roku TV platform. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 44mm (BT): $329.99 $259.99 at Best Buy 

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 may be the best Android smartwatch that money can buy, but that hasn’t stopped Best Buy from knocking a cool $70 off the price during their Black Friday sale. For just $260, you’re getting cutting-edge wearable technology with outstanding Wear OS software, advanced health and fitness tracking sensors, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge.  

  • Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen, 2023) with TP-Link smart bulb: $172 $104.99 at Amazon 

The Echo Show 8 is already a great device for fans of the Alexa ecosystem, with an 8-inch HD touchscreen display, 13MP camera, and all the smart home controls you could ever ask for. Thanks to Amazon’s Black Friday sale, you can grab one of these smart displays (usually priced at $149.99) and a TP-Link smart light for a mere $104.99. That’s $67.99 of savings, and all you need to do is hit that Add to Cart button.  

  •  OnePlus 11 128GB: $699.99 $549.99 at Best Buy 

 Featuring a unique design inspired by the look of a black hole, the OnePlus 11 is clearly one of the most eye-catching flagship phones to drop this year, but it’s just as impressive under the hood. You get the ultra-efficient Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 chipset, for one, plus a vibrant 120Hz AMOLED display and the best camera tech on any OnePlus phone to date.

Head to Best Buy before the Black Friday sale is over and you can get an unlocked OnePlus 11 for as little as $549.99. That’s a $150 discount! Plus the retailer is sweetening the deal by throwing in three months of YouTube Premium for free. And if you need more storage, the 256GB model is down to $629 — savings of $170.  

  •  Google Pixel Watch (Wi-Fi): $349.99 $199.99 at Amazon 

 The Pixel Watch is an excellent device inside and out, with a super-classy teardrop design, Wear OS software features, and all the health and fitness tracking technology you could ever need. Sure, you could go for the newer Pixel Watch 2, but the first-gen watch is almost just as good and it’s only $200 during Black Friday. 

  •  Samsung The Frame TVs: Up to $1,000 off at Samsung 

 To call Samsung’s The Frame series luxurious might be an understatement. These smart TVs pair top-of-the-line picture quality and fluid performance with a unique design that helps these TVs double as a work of art in your home. 

Just in time for Black Friday, Samsung is discounting a number of these artful 4K QLED TVs, with up to $1,000 of savings up for grabs. These are all the models on sale right now: 

  • 32" - $599.99 now $549.99
  • 43" - $999.99 now $799.99
  • 50" - $1,299.99 now $899.99
  • 55" - $1,499.99 now $979.99
  • 65" - $1,999.99 now $1,599.99
  • 75" - $2,999.99 now $1,999.99
  • 85” - $4,299.99 now $3,299.99
  •  Google Pixel Tablet 128GB: $499 $399 at Best Buy 

Google’s Pixel Tablet can handle just about any task you throw at it, and if you’re a fan of the Pixel experience, you might even consider it to be the best Android tablet that money can buy. Up until recently, discounts on the device were few and far between, but Best Buy’s Black Friday sale is finally carving a sweet $100 off the Google Pixel Tablet, making now the best time to buy.

Your purchase also comes with the free charging speaker dock that transforms the tablet into a smart display, and Best Buy is throwing in three months of YouTube Premium streaming for free!

  •  Samsung Galaxy A54: $449.99 $324.99 at Amazon 

 The Samsung Galaxy A54 is one of our favorite cheap android phones of 2023, coming with a vivid 120Hz AMOLED display, long-lasting 5,000mAh battery, and years of software support guaranteed. It may not match the Pixel 7a in the camera department, but if you’re a Samsung fan, it’s one of the best sub-$500 options out there.

Grab an unlocked A54 during Amazon’s Black Friday sale and you’ll save a sweet 28% on your purchase. That’s the biggest discount that this midrange phone has gotten yet, no strings attached.

  •  Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro: $229.99 $159.99, plus $10 gift card for FREE at Amazon 

 If you need a new pair of wireless earbuds and sound quality is important to you, you should really consider the Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro. These buds boast active noise cancellation, Enhanced 360 spatial audio support, and the ability to fine-tune your own EQ settings. Perhaps best of all, they’re comfortable enough that you can listen all day long. 

Grab a pair of Galaxy Buds 2 Pro during Amazon’s Black Friday sale and they’ll hook you up with a historic 30% discount. They’ll also throw in a $10 gift card to help you out with your holiday shopping.

  •  Beats Studio Pro $349.99 $169.95 at Best Buy 

Typically priced around $350, Beats Studio Pro headphones boast customizable spatial audio support, active noise cancellation with transparency mode, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge. 

Just in time for Black Friday, Best Buy is dropping a straight 51% off these premium cans, sending the price crashing down to just $169.95. If that wasn’t enough, they’re also throwing some free streaming service subscriptions into the mix, including three months of Apple Music and three months of Apple TV Plus.

  • Google Pixel 7 Pro: $899 $299, plus six months of FREE wireless with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile 

This isn’t a “straight” discount by any means, but it’s arguably the best deal that the Google Pixel 7 Pro has ever received. Bundle any six-month Mint Mobile plan with the purchase of the Pixel 7 Pro and the carrier will hook you up with $600 off AND six additional months of wireless service for 100% free. In other words, you could get the best Android phone of last year and a full year of T-Mobile-powered wireless coverage for as little as $33 per month. Not too shabby, if you ask us! 

  •  Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon 

This is a little different than the other offers on this list, but if you’re a Verizon customer (or you’re thinking about joining), it deserves a mention. Add a line to your wireless service with any 5G Unlimited plan and the carrier will hook you up with enough promo credits over 36 months to make the Samsung Galaxy S23 FE totally free. That’s a pretty good deal for a phone that just hit store shelves in late October.  

  • Amazon Fire TV Stick Lite: $29.99 now $15.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick: $39.99 now $19.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K: $49.99 now $24.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max: $59.99 now $39.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Cube: $139.99 now $109.99

What better time than Black Friday to upgrade your home theater setup? It all starts with a streaming device and Amazon's are some of the cheapest options around. Don't be fooled by the low prices, as these truly are some of the best streaming devices out there. 

Even Amazon's most powerful streaming device, the Fire TV Cube is on sale for $30 off. But, we'd probably lean towards the Fire TV Stick 4K Max, only because it's 50% and is quite a bit better than the other streaming sticks.

  • Govee Permanent Outdoor Lights: $299 $199 at Amazon
  • Govee Christmas Tree Lights: $89.99 $62.99 at Amazon
  • Govee Curtain Lights: $129.99 $89.99 at Amazon

I love seeing good Holiday decorations, but I'm generally not a fan of taking the time to put them up and take them down every year. So what if I told you that you can put the Govee Permanent Outdoor Lights up once and leave them up all year? I thought it was too good to be true until I reviewed them last year.

Because of that, I can have festive lights for every season thanks to the Govee app. It has unlimited possibilities, including dozens of easy presets and constantly added community styles. These LEDs can do just about anything you imagine, and they hold up all Summer and Winter since they're built so well.

Govee has also recently debuted curtain lights and Christmas tree lights, both of which tie in to the same Govee app and can be synced with your outdoor lights. This year, I'll have the dopest Christmas Lights in the whole neighborhood, both on my house and on my tree, and you can, too, with these crazy Black Friday savings.

  • GameSir X2 USB-C: $49.99 $39.99 at Amazon
  • GameSir X2 Bluetooth: $59.99 $43.19 at Amazon

I've used a lot of gaming controllers over the years, and while there are plenty of "good" controllers that work with your smartphone, there's only one real "great" one. The GameSir X2 is my all-time favorite mobile gaming controller and it always goes on sale during Prime Day/Black Friday/etc.

What makes these so good? Namely, the joysticks. These aren't those crappy Nintendo Switch-style short joysticks that are hard to aim properly with in games like Fortnite, Call of Duty, etc. These are legit joysticks that you can use to move and aim precisely in games because they're not only tall but they have adequate padding for your thumbs.

I've also found that digital triggers work better than analog ones in a lot of mobile games. Minecraft, for instance, seems to think I want to place more than one block at a time when I squeeze the analog triggers on controllers like the Razer Kishi V2. That doesn't happen on the GameSir X2, and it all helps round out why I love these controllers.

They come with a handy carrying case that you can slip a phone or portable battery in, and you can choose from USB-C or Bluetooth models for nearly the same price thanks to this sale.

  • Google Pixel Buds Pro: $199 $119 on Amazon
  • Google Pixel Buds A-Series: $99 $59 on Amazon

  • Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 4 128GB: $999.99 $299 with Verizon activation at Best Buy

We once called it the "perfect foldable", and now you can save a whopping $700 on the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 4 when you activate it through Verizon on the Best Buy website. That's obviously an incredible discount, and Galaxy fans are flocking in droves to take advantage of it, so check Best Buy's stock before you get too excited! If you don't want to activate right away, it appears the Best Buy is also selling the unlocked phone with a still-great $535 discount, but it's currently out of stock.  

It may not be the latest foldable phone from Samsung, but the Z Flip 4 nevertheless boasts the great Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Plus Gen 1 processor, a pair of vibrant 120Hz displays, and a unique, exceedingly pocketable design. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Watch 4 Classic: $379 $149 at Walmart

Someone at Walmart corporate must have bought an overstock of Galaxy Watch 4 Classic watches at some point, because they've been selling the 46mm at a discount for months — though at $149, it's about as low as we've ever seen it, and it's just as stylish as ever.

Even though the watch is "old" compared to the Watch 6 Classic — currently $349 — it's still due to receive Wear OS support through mid-2025. So you're essentially getting a stylish timepiece for less than half the price of a new Classic model, and the promise that it'll get Wear OS 5 and 6 down the line. It's about as close as you'll get to a budget Android watch that's still worth using!

  • 32" UR59 ViewFinity 4K UHD (3840x2160) monitor: $450 $290.87 at Amazon
  • 32" UJ59 ViewFinity 4K UHD (3840x2160) monitor: $340 $269.99 at Amazon

We've highlighted a couple of Samsung's gaming monitors, but we don't want to neglect people who want a reliable 4K monitor for productivity. In this case, getting a 32-inch 4K display for under $300 is a pretty fantastic steal. Our colleagues at Windows Central rated the UJ59 as their best budget 4K monitor, praising the color accuracy, thin bezel, and support for FreeSync and G-Sync. The only question is whether you want to spend a few extra bucks for the curved version. 

  • Samsung A23 5G: $300 $264.58 at Amazon

As much as we love Samsung's premium foldables and S23s, they're still expensive even at Cyber Monday prices. If you want to start with something affordable, look into the Galaxy A23 5G, currently 12% off for Cyber Monday. 

Our #2 pick for the best Android phones under $300, the A23 5G gives you a 120Hz display, 5,000mAh battery, a future Android 14 OS update, and the promise of four years of security updates through 2026. Its Snapdragon 695 chip will do its job better than some other budget options, too. 

Still, if you can afford it, the Galaxy A54 ($324, or $125 off) is a much more reliable and powerful phone for $60 more. 

  • Sony WH-1000XM4 headphones: $348 $228 at Amazon

The Sony WH-1000XM4 may not be the best wireless headphones on the market now that the XM5s have come along, but they're still outstanding headphones, with an elegant, ultra-comfortable design, customizable active noise cancellation, and up to 30 hours of battery life on a single charge. Thanks to Cyber Monday, they're also seeing a sweet 34% discount at Amazon, dropping these cans to a lowest-ever price. 

You can also grab these headphones for the same price at Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale.  

  • Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra 128GB: $1,199.99 $499.99 with activation at Best Buy

To be totally honest, I expected Black Friday to have a better showing of deals, with Cyber Monday merely offering the leftovers. Fortunately for all of us, Best Buy is subverting that expectation by slashing $700 off the Galaxy S22 Ultra when you activate the phone through their site. No trade-in required! 

For just $499.99, you're getting one of the best phones released in 2022, coming complete with the powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 processor, 8K video support, and a gorgeous 6.8-inch AMOLED display with a built-in S Pen stylus. If you choose not to activate the phone today, you'll still get a decent $120 off (although if that's the case, I'd go with this $900 S23 Ultra deal). 

  • Echo Show 5 (3rd Gen): $89.99 $39.99 at Amazon

If you're looking to revamp your smart home ecosystem this holiday season, look no further than the Echo Show 5 (3rd Gen). This "best on a budget" smart display boasts a compact and versatile 5.5-inch touchscreen display, some decent-for-the-size speakers, and a crystal-clear 2MP camera for video calls and selfies, I guess. The compact size means this smart display won't interrupt your home's décor, but you'll still be able to manage your calendar, check the weather, and much more using simple Alexa voice commands.

With a starting price of $90, the Echo Show 5 was already cheap, but Amazon's Cyber Monday sale is slashing an epic 56% off the price of the display, sending it crashing down to a mere $39.99.  

  • Insignia 32-inch F20 Smart Fire TV: $149.99 $79.99 at Amazon

If you still have some money left over after all the Black Friday and Cyber Monday shopping, why not spend $80 on a smart TV? Insignia's 32-inch F20 Fire TV is still sitting with a 47% discount during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale, and that's an absolute steal. Sure, it's not the most feature-packed TV on the market, but the F20 boasts a nice-looking HD screen, the Fire TV streaming platform, and a free Alexa Voice Remote. And again, it's 80 bucks. 

  • Google Pixel 7a 128GB: $499 $374 at Best Buy

This 25% discount on the Google Pixel 7a was one of the most publicized deals over the past Black Friday and Cyber Monday weekend, but it deserves just one more mention for anyone who missed it. The Pixel 7a is one of our favorite Android phones of the year, balancing flagship-level software with a reasonable price tag and the best haptics in its class. 

With a starting price of $499, the Pixel 7a was already affordable, but this Cyber Monday discount has sent the price of the unlocked phone crashing down to just $374, which is the cheapest that it's ever been.  Best Buy is even sweetening the deal by throwing three months of YouTube Premium for free. 

  • Garmin Forerunner 955 47mm: $499.99 $399.99 at Best Buy

Our resident wearable expert Michael Hicks once called the Garmin Forerunner 955 the "best runner's watch, period", and now you can grab one for the discounted price of $399.99 during Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale. This durable watch provides all of the health and fitness tracking data you could ever need, plus it comes with dozens of activity modes, accurate GPS support, and up to 15 days of battery life in smartwatch mode. 

  • Amazon Fire 7 (2022) tablet: $59.99 $39.99 at Amazon

A tablet for $40? That price alone could justify the purchase of a Fire 7 Tablet during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale, but it helps that it's honestly a pretty good device when it comes down to it. Far from the most feature-packed or innovative Android tablet on the market, the Amazon Fire 7 nevertheless boasts a lightweight 7-inch display, expandable storage, and enough power to handle most day-to-day tasks without skipping a beat. It's a cheap tablet, but it's a good cheap tablet, and for $40, it's an absolute steal. 

  • OnePlus Nord N30 128GB: $299.99 $149 with activation at Best Buy

The OnePlus Nord N30 is one of the best cheap Android phones to come out this year, with a vibrant 120Hz display, ultra-efficient Snapdragon chip, and some pretty amazing camera tech for the price. It even has a headphone jack! With a starting retail price of $299.99, the Nord N30 was already quite cheap, but Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale just upped the ante by dropping 50% off the price of the phone, as long as you're willing to activate it through their site. If you'd prefer the unlocked version, you'll still save a nice $70 on your purchase, no strings attached.
item.content:encoded:
Quick Menu

1. Quick links
2. Editor's picks
3. LIVE deals

If you've been even remotely online the past few weeks, you probably noticed that Cyber Monday deals have taken over the internet. Every retailer, streaming service, and wireless carrier under the sun has been launching holiday promotions in an attempt to earn your business, and if you're anything like me, you're just about ready to tune it all out. 

In an attempt to make life easier for all of us, we've been working to curate the endless lists of deals so the holiday shopping experience (for tech, at least) is a bit more streamlined this year. In other words, if you were planning on buying anything Android-related this weekend, you've come to the right place. From now until the end of Cyber Monday (and probably beyond), we're going to be gathering all of our favorite discounted devices and dropping them below for your perusal. Oh, and we'll be doing this LIVE so you don't miss anything. 

Amazon, Best Buy, Samsung and many more have all launched record-smashing Cyber Monday deals. Keep reading to see all of the best picks on the web, and check back later if you don't find anything now: we'll keep adding new offers as they appear. First up, let's take a look at the Top 5 truly unmissable Black Friday Samsung deals. If you want to go straight to our live feed, simply click this Jump to Live Deals ↓ button. 

Quick links

  • Amazon: Up to 60% off Amazon devices, headphones, and more
  • Best Buy: Historic price drops on phones, TVs, tech
  • Samsung: Up to $1,000 off TVs, Galaxy S23, Z Fold 5, trade-in offers
  • Walmart: Sitewide deals on appliances, games, tech
  • Verizon: Up to $1,000 off Samsung, bundle discounts, free phones
  • AT&T: Free S23 Plus, Z Flip 5, iPhone 15 with eligible trade-in/new line
  • Mint Mobile: $600 off Pixel 7 Pro, plus six months of free wireless
  • Lenovo: Up to 78% off PCs, monitors, and more
  • Dell: Up to 60% off gaming laptops, Chromebooks, and monitors
  • Hulu: Get a YEAR of streaming for $0.99 per month
  • Max: Six months of the With Ads plan for $2.99 per month

Editor's picks

1. Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 5 256GB: $999.99 $799.99 at Best Buy

The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 5 was our favorite foldable phone released this year, boasting a powerful Snapdragon chip, a new-and-improved cover display, and a durable clamshell construction. Grab the unlocked flip phone during Best Buy's Black Friday sale and you'll get $200 off no strings attached. There's also some enhanced trade-in credit up for grabs, plus you'll get a free month of Xbox Game Pass. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $799.99 | Samsung - $999.99 (up to $600 off with trade-inView Deal

2. Google Pixel 7 Pro 128GB: $600 off, plus six months FREE with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile

This is not a Cyber Monday-specific deal, but it deserves a mention nevertheless. Pair the purchase of the excellent Pixel 7 Pro with any six-month wireless plan at Mint Mobile, and the carrier will hook you up with $600 off the phone and an additional six months of wireless service for 100% free. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $649 | Amazon - $649View Deal

3. Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 40mm: $299.99 $228.99 at Amazon

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 topped our list of the best Android smartwatches of 2023, and now you can grab the 40mm version for just $228.99 at Amazon. With the GW6, you're getting top-of-the-line Wear OS software, tons of battery life, and all of the health and fitness tracking features you could ever need in a watch. 

Price comparison: Best Buy - $229.99 | Samsung - $229.99View Deal

4.  Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon

The Galaxy S23 FE just hit store shelves in late October, and yet Verizon customers can already grab one for 100% free when they add a line with any 5G Unlimited plan. No trade-in required! The balanced Galaxy S23 FE may not have been the most groundbreaking device to hit store shelves this year, but if you're looking to update your wireless service anyway, this Verizon deal is tough to beat. 

Price comparison: Amazon - $399.99 | Best Buy - $449.99View Deal

5. Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro: $239.99 $159.99, plus $10 gift card at Amazon

Cutting-edge and exceedingly comfortable, we picked the Galaxy Buds 2 Pro as the "best-sounding" wireless earbuds on the market today. Grab a pair from Amazon right now and you'll get a historic 31% discount AND a free $10 gift card, no strings attached. 

Price comparison: Samsung - $159.99 | Best Buy - $159.99 View Deal

6. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 5 256GB: $1,799 $999 at Best Buy

Get a phone and a tablet folded into one device, now at nearly half cost with this $800 off deal at Best Buy. Just activate it today and walk out of the store with one of the best phones of 2023.

Price comparison: Amazon - $1,299 | up to $1,000 off at AT&T with trade-inView Deal

LIVE deals

  • Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra: $1,199.99 $899.99 at Best Buy

Why not kick things off with the most powerful Android phone on the market? The Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra boasts a built-in stylus, a gorgeous 6.8-inch AMOLED display, and the power of the Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor. Grab one of these beasts of performance at Best Buy and you'll save a record-smashing $300 on your purchase. As the biggest drawback of the S23 Ultra has always been its prohibitive price, this Black Friday discount is a big deal. 

  • Fossil Gen 6 44mm: $299 $169.99 at Amazon

Stylish and versatile, the Fossil Gen 6 boasts an efficient Qualcomm chip, loads of activity-tracking features, and great battery life with super-fast charging. It's a few years old at this point, but that isn't necessarily a bad thing, as you can currently grab this watch for just $170 during Amazon's Black Friday sale. That's not a record low price for the watch, but it's pretty darn close.

  • Acer Chromebook Spin 714: $699.99 $469.99 at Best Buy

We've said it before and we'll say it again: Acer's Chromebook Spin 714 offers the perfect balance of cost and performance, especially when you pair it with a $230 discount during Best Buy's Black Friday sale. You get the 360-degree hinge that lets you turn the laptop into a tablet, plus a 13th Gen Intel Core processor, durable military-grade construction, and up to 10 hours of battery life on a single charge. Best Buy will even throw in a free protective sleeve and three months of YouTube Premium for free. 

  • TCL 65" Class 4 Series 4K UHD Roku TV: $529.99 $228 at Walmart

If you've been hunting for a smart TV this holiday season, you probably noticed that it's nearly impossible to find a 65-inch TV for less than $500, especially one that supports 4K UHD picture. This Black Friday deal from Walmart changes all that. For a mere $228, you're getting outstanding picture with 4K upscaling, HDR support, and of course, instant access to all of your favorite streaming services (plus a lot of free stuff!) thanks to the Roku TV platform. 

  • Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 44mm (BT): $329.99 $259.99 at Best Buy 

The Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 may be the best Android smartwatch that money can buy, but that hasn’t stopped Best Buy from knocking a cool $70 off the price during their Black Friday sale. For just $260, you’re getting cutting-edge wearable technology with outstanding Wear OS software, advanced health and fitness tracking sensors, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge.  

  • Echo Show 8 (3rd Gen, 2023) with TP-Link smart bulb: $172 $104.99 at Amazon 

The Echo Show 8 is already a great device for fans of the Alexa ecosystem, with an 8-inch HD touchscreen display, 13MP camera, and all the smart home controls you could ever ask for. Thanks to Amazon’s Black Friday sale, you can grab one of these smart displays (usually priced at $149.99) and a TP-Link smart light for a mere $104.99. That’s $67.99 of savings, and all you need to do is hit that Add to Cart button.  

  •  OnePlus 11 128GB: $699.99 $549.99 at Best Buy 

 Featuring a unique design inspired by the look of a black hole, the OnePlus 11 is clearly one of the most eye-catching flagship phones to drop this year, but it’s just as impressive under the hood. You get the ultra-efficient Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 chipset, for one, plus a vibrant 120Hz AMOLED display and the best camera tech on any OnePlus phone to date.

Head to Best Buy before the Black Friday sale is over and you can get an unlocked OnePlus 11 for as little as $549.99. That’s a $150 discount! Plus the retailer is sweetening the deal by throwing in three months of YouTube Premium for free. And if you need more storage, the 256GB model is down to $629 — savings of $170.  

  •  Google Pixel Watch (Wi-Fi): $349.99 $199.99 at Amazon 

 The Pixel Watch is an excellent device inside and out, with a super-classy teardrop design, Wear OS software features, and all the health and fitness tracking technology you could ever need. Sure, you could go for the newer Pixel Watch 2, but the first-gen watch is almost just as good and it’s only $200 during Black Friday. 

  •  Samsung The Frame TVs: Up to $1,000 off at Samsung 

 To call Samsung’s The Frame series luxurious might be an understatement. These smart TVs pair top-of-the-line picture quality and fluid performance with a unique design that helps these TVs double as a work of art in your home. 

Just in time for Black Friday, Samsung is discounting a number of these artful 4K QLED TVs, with up to $1,000 of savings up for grabs. These are all the models on sale right now: 

  • 32" - $599.99 now $549.99
  • 43" - $999.99 now $799.99
  • 50" - $1,299.99 now $899.99
  • 55" - $1,499.99 now $979.99
  • 65" - $1,999.99 now $1,599.99
  • 75" - $2,999.99 now $1,999.99
  • 85” - $4,299.99 now $3,299.99
  •  Google Pixel Tablet 128GB: $499 $399 at Best Buy 

Google’s Pixel Tablet can handle just about any task you throw at it, and if you’re a fan of the Pixel experience, you might even consider it to be the best Android tablet that money can buy. Up until recently, discounts on the device were few and far between, but Best Buy’s Black Friday sale is finally carving a sweet $100 off the Google Pixel Tablet, making now the best time to buy.

Your purchase also comes with the free charging speaker dock that transforms the tablet into a smart display, and Best Buy is throwing in three months of YouTube Premium streaming for free!

  •  Samsung Galaxy A54: $449.99 $324.99 at Amazon 

 The Samsung Galaxy A54 is one of our favorite cheap android phones of 2023, coming with a vivid 120Hz AMOLED display, long-lasting 5,000mAh battery, and years of software support guaranteed. It may not match the Pixel 7a in the camera department, but if you’re a Samsung fan, it’s one of the best sub-$500 options out there.

Grab an unlocked A54 during Amazon’s Black Friday sale and you’ll save a sweet 28% on your purchase. That’s the biggest discount that this midrange phone has gotten yet, no strings attached.

  •  Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro: $229.99 $159.99, plus $10 gift card for FREE at Amazon 

 If you need a new pair of wireless earbuds and sound quality is important to you, you should really consider the Samsung Galaxy Buds 2 Pro. These buds boast active noise cancellation, Enhanced 360 spatial audio support, and the ability to fine-tune your own EQ settings. Perhaps best of all, they’re comfortable enough that you can listen all day long. 

Grab a pair of Galaxy Buds 2 Pro during Amazon’s Black Friday sale and they’ll hook you up with a historic 30% discount. They’ll also throw in a $10 gift card to help you out with your holiday shopping.

  •  Beats Studio Pro $349.99 $169.95 at Best Buy 

Typically priced around $350, Beats Studio Pro headphones boast customizable spatial audio support, active noise cancellation with transparency mode, and up to 40 hours of battery life on a single charge. 

Just in time for Black Friday, Best Buy is dropping a straight 51% off these premium cans, sending the price crashing down to just $169.95. If that wasn’t enough, they’re also throwing some free streaming service subscriptions into the mix, including three months of Apple Music and three months of Apple TV Plus.

  • Google Pixel 7 Pro: $899 $299, plus six months of FREE wireless with any six-month plan at Mint Mobile 

This isn’t a “straight” discount by any means, but it’s arguably the best deal that the Google Pixel 7 Pro has ever received. Bundle any six-month Mint Mobile plan with the purchase of the Pixel 7 Pro and the carrier will hook you up with $600 off AND six additional months of wireless service for 100% free. In other words, you could get the best Android phone of last year and a full year of T-Mobile-powered wireless coverage for as little as $33 per month. Not too shabby, if you ask us! 

  •  Samsung Galaxy S23 FE 128GB: $599.99 FREE with new line at Verizon 

This is a little different than the other offers on this list, but if you’re a Verizon customer (or you’re thinking about joining), it deserves a mention. Add a line to your wireless service with any 5G Unlimited plan and the carrier will hook you up with enough promo credits over 36 months to make the Samsung Galaxy S23 FE totally free. That’s a pretty good deal for a phone that just hit store shelves in late October.  

  • Amazon Fire TV Stick Lite: $29.99 now $15.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick: $39.99 now $19.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K: $49.99 now $24.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Max: $59.99 now $39.99
  • Amazon Fire TV Cube: $139.99 now $109.99

What better time than Black Friday to upgrade your home theater setup? It all starts with a streaming device and Amazon's are some of the cheapest options around. Don't be fooled by the low prices, as these truly are some of the best streaming devices out there. 

Even Amazon's most powerful streaming device, the Fire TV Cube is on sale for $30 off. But, we'd probably lean towards the Fire TV Stick 4K Max, only because it's 50% and is quite a bit better than the other streaming sticks.

  • Govee Permanent Outdoor Lights: $299 $199 at Amazon
  • Govee Christmas Tree Lights: $89.99 $62.99 at Amazon
  • Govee Curtain Lights: $129.99 $89.99 at Amazon

I love seeing good Holiday decorations, but I'm generally not a fan of taking the time to put them up and take them down every year. So what if I told you that you can put the Govee Permanent Outdoor Lights up once and leave them up all year? I thought it was too good to be true until I reviewed them last year.

Because of that, I can have festive lights for every season thanks to the Govee app. It has unlimited possibilities, including dozens of easy presets and constantly added community styles. These LEDs can do just about anything you imagine, and they hold up all Summer and Winter since they're built so well.

Govee has also recently debuted curtain lights and Christmas tree lights, both of which tie in to the same Govee app and can be synced with your outdoor lights. This year, I'll have the dopest Christmas Lights in the whole neighborhood, both on my house and on my tree, and you can, too, with these crazy Black Friday savings.

  • GameSir X2 USB-C: $49.99 $39.99 at Amazon
  • GameSir X2 Bluetooth: $59.99 $43.19 at Amazon

I've used a lot of gaming controllers over the years, and while there are plenty of "good" controllers that work with your smartphone, there's only one real "great" one. The GameSir X2 is my all-time favorite mobile gaming controller and it always goes on sale during Prime Day/Black Friday/etc.

What makes these so good? Namely, the joysticks. These aren't those crappy Nintendo Switch-style short joysticks that are hard to aim properly with in games like Fortnite, Call of Duty, etc. These are legit joysticks that you can use to move and aim precisely in games because they're not only tall but they have adequate padding for your thumbs.

I've also found that digital triggers work better than analog ones in a lot of mobile games. Minecraft, for instance, seems to think I want to place more than one block at a time when I squeeze the analog triggers on controllers like the Razer Kishi V2. That doesn't happen on the GameSir X2, and it all helps round out why I love these controllers.

They come with a handy carrying case that you can slip a phone or portable battery in, and you can choose from USB-C or Bluetooth models for nearly the same price thanks to this sale.

  • Google Pixel Buds Pro: $199 $119 on Amazon
  • Google Pixel Buds A-Series: $99 $59 on Amazon

Airpods might be the household name because of the fruit logo, but that doesn't mean they're necessarily the best earbuds money can buy. Google makes an incredible pair of earbuds in the Pixel Buds Pro which feature excellent active noise cancelling, superb sound quality, Google Assistant built right in, and awesome new features that Google just launched.

But if $120 is still too expensive for a new pair of earbuds, Google's Pixel Buds A-Series are half that price at $60 for Black Friday. The battery life isn't as good as the Pro model and the style looks a bit cheaper, but it's hard to argue with a great pair of wireless earbuds at this price.

  • Acer Chromebook Spin 714 (2023): $699.99 $469.99 at Best Buy

This year has been pretty darn great if you're a fan of Chromebooks, but if you've been holding off and waiting for a good sale, now's your time to shine. Acer's Chromebook Spin 714 (2023) is easily one of the best Chromebooks, regardless of what your budget is. For Black Friday, Best Buy has our favorite deal as the Spin 714 (2023) has plummeted down to just $470. 

Even at the full retail price of $699, the Spin 714 is worth every penny, but the fact that you can save $230 is bonkers. With this Chromebook, you'll get the latest Intel 13th Gen Core i5-1335U, 8GB of RAM, 256GB of storage, and all of the new Chromebook Plus features. 

  • Amazon Fire HD 10 (2023): $139.99 $79.99 at Amazon

Amazon’s Fire HD 10 tablet is the perfect device for casually surfing the web or streaming your favorite content. Typically priced around $140, the Fire tablet was already pretty affordable, but now Amazon has upped the ante by slashing an epic 43% off the device, knocking it down to just 80 bucks for Black Friday. 

With the 2023 Fire HD 10, you’re getting a bright 10-inch 1080p HD screen, up to 13 hours of battery life, and 3GB of RAM with an octa-core CPU. For just $79.99, that’s a deal worth celebrating.

  • Anker Nano Power Bank: $50 $35 at Amazon

Anker is one of our favorite brands when it comes to charging accessories. The Anker Nano Power Bank not only offers plenty of power in a small chassis, but it also comes with a built-in USB-C cord that doubles as a loop/handle, making it easy to carry around. And with the little display on the side, you'll always know how much charge you have left. For just $35, this is a steal for anyone who finds themselves constantly looking for a charger, especially since it charges pretty fast at 30W. That's also why it's one of the charging accessories we recommend buying on Black Friday.

  • Status Audio Between 3ANC: $249 $139 at Amazon

Status Audio isn't a brand you may have heard of, but its Between 3 ANC wireless earbuds go up against the best that this category has to offer — and come out on top. What makes the earbuds so good is a hybrid driver arrangement that delivers amazing bass and detailed highs. 

You also get all the extras that's standard in high-end earbuds; there's ANC, multi-device connectivity, IPX5 water resistance, and you can easily change the sound profile. The best part is that these last up to 7.5 hours on a full charge, and that's more than what you get from the best Samsung and Sony earbuds. 

  • Crucial X9 Pro 4TB Portable SSD: $257 $182 at Amazon

Crucial's X9 Pro is one of the best portable SSDs you can get at the moment, and the 4TB model is down to just $182, making it a great bargain. The X9 Pro uses Micron's QLC flash memory, hits over 1000MB/s in reads and writes, and is ideal for use with your phone, notebook, or any other device that connects over USB-C. 

If you don't want to buy a 4TB drive, the X9 Pro is available in a 1TB version that's down to $59, and the 2TB model is now listed at $109. 

  • Nothing Phone (2): $699 $559 at Amazon

If you want a phone with a distinctive design and great hardware, you should consider picking up the Nothing Phone (2). The see-through design at the back combined with LED lighting makes it stand out, and you get much more powerful hardware this time around, and interesting software with plenty of unique extras. 

The best part is that this variant comes with 256GB of storage as standard, so you are getting a good overall value here. 

  • UGREEN Nexode 100W USB-C Charger with 15W MagSafe: $179 $129 at Amazon

UGREEN's Nexode 100W 2-in-1 Charger is a standard GaN charger that has three ports and goes up to 100W over the USB PD standard. But what gives this an edge is the MagSafe base that's built into the top, and that lets you charge your iPhone — or any Android phone with a MagSafe case — at 15W. 

The versatility makes this a great charger if you need wireless charging as well as 100W wired charging in a single product. 

  • Marshall Emberton II:  $169.99 $119.99 at Amazon

The Marshall Emberton II is one of the best portable Bluetooth speakers around. It sounds super fine-tuned and packs plenty of power. This is surprising considering how small and compact the thing is. Leather meets metal in luxurious harmony, giving the Emberton II a timeless look of class.

Usually, this waterproof Marshall speaker costs around $170, but the device is on sale for only $119.99 this Black Friday. It's a fantastic buy that you won't regret one bit. And if you've got the budget, why not grab two and use them in Stack Mode for stereo sound?

  • Shargeek Storm 2 Slim: $199.99 $109.98 at Amazon

Who doesn't love transparent tech? Gadgets like the see-through Shargeek Storm 2 Slim allow us to take a peek at the incredible level of sophistication that goes on inside our gadgets. This slim 20,000mAh power bank usually costs an arm and a leg, but it's cheaper than ever with today's Black Friday deal. If you've been eyeing this power bank for a while, now's your chance.

The Shargeek Storm 2 Slim is the stuff of every geek's dreams. It has an IPS LCD screen that displays all the charging details you could want and then some. There's a 100W PD USB-C port and a 30W USB-A port, adding up to a whopping 130W of power. At nearly $100 knocked off, this is an amazing bargain.

  • Amazon Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition 32GB: $189.99 $139.99 at Amazon

The Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition takes the best Kindle from Amazon's lineup and makes it even better. This reading device lasts for weeks on a single charge, charges via USB-C and wirelessly, and boasts IPX8 water resistance. The Paperwhite Signature Edition also comes with 32GB of storage as standard, which is more than you'll ever need to store e-books and audiobooks.

A tablet for $40? That price alone could justify the purchase of a Fire 7 Tablet during Amazon's Cyber Monday sale, but it helps that it's honestly a pretty good device when it comes down to it. Far from the most feature-packed or innovative Android tablet on the market, the Amazon Fire 7 nevertheless boasts a lightweight 7-inch display, expandable storage, and enough power to handle most day-to-day tasks without skipping a beat. It's a cheap tablet, but it's a good cheap tablet, and for $40, it's an absolute steal. 

  • OnePlus Nord N30 128GB: $299.99 $149 with activation at Best Buy

The OnePlus Nord N30 is one of the best cheap Android phones to come out this year, with a vibrant 120Hz display, ultra-efficient Snapdragon chip, and some pretty amazing camera tech for the price. It even has a headphone jack! With a starting retail price of $299.99, the Nord N30 was already quite cheap, but Best Buy's Cyber Monday sale just upped the ante by dropping 50% off the price of the phone, as long as you're willing to activate it through their site. If you'd prefer the unlocked version, you'll still save a nice $70 on your purchase, no strings attached.
